visa_types.overview:
Overview
A study visa is granted for those who are visiting Estonia for study or research.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
A study visa is granted for those who are visiting Estonia for study or research.

## Visa Fees

[Table:Study]
Please  Note:
There is a service charge of 22 € (Inclusive of 20% VAT) levied per application over and above the visa fees
The visa application centre offers an optional service at a nominal additional cost:

[Table:Study]
All Visa Fee and VFS service fees are inclusive of 20% VAT and are payable in cash in Euro only.
All charges Visa Fee, VFS service charges are to be paid in cash only in Euros. 

## Documents Required
Please click here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/2pm2wezMZYGwNSEohDao0g/b24154149fd8ced808a1a4e12941e50f/estonia-checklist-jan-25.pdf) for Checklist for Short Stay Visa

## Check List

## 
Cheklist 

## To Download a Form:
- Click on the form link
- When the form opens, save the form on your computer 
OR
- Press the right button on your mouse on the required link.
- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer.

## Photo Specifications
- No more than 6-months old
- 35-40mm in width
- Taken against a light background
- Close up of your head and top of your shoulders so that your face takes up 70 -80% of the photograph
- No glasses

## Download Forms

## 
Application Form (https://eelviisataotlus.vm.ee/)

visa_types.overview:
Overview
Tourist visa is granted for those where the intention is to visit Estonia for tourism and sightseeing without having an invitation from an Estonian referent.

visa_types.overview:
Overview
The visa is intended to allow a foreign citizen to visit Estonia for a limited period of time. This visa category is for people who want to visit Estonia for the purpose of sporting events, etc.
Applicants must submit documents showing that they fall into this category.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
The visa is intended to allow a foreign citizen to visit Estonia for a limited period of time. This visa category is for people who want to visit Estonia for the purpose of sporting events, etc.
Applicants must submit documents showing that they fall into this category.

## Visa Fees

[Table:Sports]
Please  Note:
There is a service charge of 22 € (Inclusive of 20% VAT) levied per application over and above the visa fees
The visa application centre offers an optional service at a nominal additional cost:

[Table:Sports]
All Visa Fee and VFS service fees are inclusive of 20% VAT and are payable in cash in Euro only.
All charges Visa Fee, VFS Global service charges are to be paid in cash only in Euros. 

## Documents Required
Please click here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/2pm2wezMZYGwNSEohDao0g/b24154149fd8ced808a1a4e12941e50f/estonia-checklist-jan-25.pdf) for Checklist for Short Stay Visa

visa_types.overview:
Overview
This category of visa caters for people wishing to stay in Estonia for a period maximum 3 months to visit the member of his/her family or friend.
visa_types.full_text:
